_comment: Singleton via the autoname-on-hidden-field trick: every doc is named the same value via a hidden field, so only one row can exist (uniqueness on `name` enforces it). The after_migrate hook in frappe.friday_core.llm.after_migrate creates the row on fresh sites. We use this rather than `issingle: 1` because Single doctypes store all fields in tabSingles as key-value rows which is less efficient and harder to reason about; a regular DocType with autoname-on-constant gives us the same admin UX (one row, edit-only) with normal column semantics.

fields.label: Default LLM Provider
fields.description: Fallback provider used when an Agent Profile has no model_provider set. Leave blank if you always set model_provider explicitly on each profile.

name: Agent Settings
